prompt: How many students are enrolled in each course?

inputData.question: How many students are enrolled in each course?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"How many students are enrolled in each course?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"How many students are enrolled in each course?"},"startedAt":1771803470225,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Count distinct active students per course by joining courses -> course_sections -> enrollments. Use LEFT JOIN so courses with no enrollments are included; count distinct student_id to avoid double-counting students in multiple sections. Order deterministically by enrolled count then code.","sql":"SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id) AS enrolled_students
FROM public.courses AS c
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections AS cs
  ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments AS e
  ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY enrolled_students DESC, c.code ASC;","assumptions":["Count should be unique students per course across all sections (COUNT(DISTINCT student_id)).","Only active enrollments (is_active = true) are considered.","Schema 'public' and tables courses, course_sections, enrollments with the inspected columns exist as discovered during preflight."]},"endedAt":1771803494702},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id) AS enrolled_students
FROM public.courses AS c
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections AS cs
  ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments AS e
  ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY enrolled_students DESC, c.code ASC;"},"startedAt":1771803494704,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT

LEFT JOIN public.enrollments AS e
  ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY enrolled_students DESC, c.code resultRaw.sql:
SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id) AS enrolled_students
FROM public.courses AS c
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections AS cs
  ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments AS e
  ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY enrolled_students DESC, c.code ASC;

result.sql:
SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id) AS enrolled_students
FROM public.courses AS c
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections AS cs
  ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments AS e
  ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY enrolled_students DESC, c.code ASC;
